name: Jiangxi Selon Industrial Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangxi Selon Industrial Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, markets, and sells fine chemicals in China, Hong Kong, Macao, and Taiwan. It offers AC foaming agents, thionyl chloride, chlor-alkali, and other chemical products, as well as industrial sodium hydroxide, liquid chlorine, synthetic hydrochloric acid, and aqueous ammonia. The company also exports its products to approximately 10 countries, including Southeast Asia, South Korea, Turkey, Italy, the United States, etc. Jiangxi Selon Industrial Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Leping, China.
